billingPeriod.label: Jul 1 - Jul 3, 2026

yelpAds.note: Sat Jul 4 ~7 AM LIVE Chrome scrape. Last 30d: 34.6k ad impr (77% of 44.9k), 433 ad clicks, 534 ad page visits (57% of 930), 128 ad leads (68% of 187). Billing period Jul 1-Jul 3 = $47.24 spend / $1.07 CPC / $4.29 CPL (spend +$21.54 vs Jul 1-2). 12mo: Ads 1,035 leads (61%) / Organic 667 (39%) / Total 1,702; forecast 172; 12mo ad page visits 8.2k. Leads breakdown: Directions/Map 738, Calls 112, Website 828, CTA 24. Bonus budget remaining not shown on dashboard. Yelp inbox badge shows 15. NOT re-scraped at Sun Jul 5 4 AM run; figures as of Sat Jul 4.
